_description: Platform market structure for Switzerland vs Colombia R16 2026-07-07/08 — crowd prices NOT YET AVAILABLE (markets open, no mid-price captured)
note: Platform questions pulled from bot/data/markets_raw.jsonl. Crowd mid-prices NOT captured pre-match — need to be fetched from API or observed during match window. Smarkets external FTR (win/draw/win) data not yet fetched.

questions.question: Will Dan Ndoye (Switzerland, #11) score a goal (excluding own goals) in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will Switzerland keep a clean sheet in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will the match be tied at halftime?
Will there be 4 or more total cards shown in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will Colombia have 5 or more corner kicks in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will Switzerland have 4 or more shots on target in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will a substitute score or assist a goal (excluding own goals) in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will the first goal of the match be scored in the second half of regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will either team win both halves in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will the match be decided by exactly one goal in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will at least one card be shown in each half of regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will Luis Díaz (Colombia, #7) score a goal (excluding own goals) in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will Jhon Arias (Colombia, #11) score or assist a goal (excluding own goals) in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
Will Colombia advance to the quarterfinals?
Will Breel Embolo (Switzerland, #7) have 1 or more shots on target in regulation (90 minutes + stoppage time)?
